TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ruisui, title = Ruisui, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ruisui} }

S.FORM: Ruisui Ruisui a sakuwan ku Hualien. kumud nu kalesakan, 151.59 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 57.39 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 7.4 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 9,520 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 3,717 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 4,438 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 47%(Pangcah, Sakizaya) ku kasabinawlan. u tademaw ilabu nu siyang u paylang ku alumanay. nikasakuwakuwan Ruisui mala 11 a cuwen atu 16 ku niyazu'. kina 16 a niyazu'sa, Langas , Lacihakan , Morocan , Atolan , Koyo , Ukang , Narowan , Kalala , Sapat , Maibul , Olalip , Fanaw , Olaw , Marorok , Cirocan , Kiwit . ÁĎěÁ©óťĄČ(ťėŅÁĺéŤ™ě:KohkohÔľõśííŚ•áŤźäťõÖŤ™ě:KuhkuhÔľõŤáļÁĀ£ŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěśĶ∑ťôłŤÖĒ:suiňá suiňá hiongňč) . Ruisui/Kuhkuh Amis a kamu Kohkoh han, Sakizaya a kamu Kuhkuh han, Taywan a Ngayngay a kamu hay-lu a ngiha nu suiňá suiňá hiongňč, tini i Taywan Hualien akuwan tepanay pasatimulan, nuamisan belaw u Bataan, nusatipan belaw u Wan-zung akuwan, Zuo-si akuwan, nuwalian belaw nu Bakung a kenis, nutinulan mitules tu Pusuku, izaw ku amislic micaluway tuniyan a kenis. tunian a binawln izaw ku Layak, Ngayngay atu Taywan a binacadan angangan, i Taywan u Amis ku katuday a tademaw, zuma u Maibil a niyazu' u Sakizayaay u angangan ku binacadan, i tiniay u Amis atu Ngayngay a kamu. :shuiňämuiňč ), Mizuo,śĒĻÁāļťü≥ŤŅĎšĻč"ÁĎěÁ©ó"(Mizuho). . Ruisui/Kuhkuh malumanay a ngangan "Suy-wey", Taywan a Ngayngay a kamu hay-lu a ngiha nu shuiňämuiňč, u imi u Siu-ku-luan xńę a ikul, zikuzan u Lipun a tademawan zayhan a u śįīŚįĺ nu ngiha nu Lipun mazapi ku "Mizuo", pasumat han u Ruisui/Kuhkuh "Mizuho". hamin ku hekal izaw ku 135 pin-bang-kung-li, izaw ku utademaw pakala tu cacay mang cacay lasubu kuliwan a tademaw, malikid ku nanum nu Siw -ku luan a sauwac a balungaay ku katinengan. . Ruisui/Kuhkuh palecad izaw ku zuzang , ungsing, singanganay a uciy uyni u kapahay a saka izaw, mala u Kalinku mapilung tu aidangan a tu singanganay a kakitaizaan. hekal a lala' Ruisui/Kuhkuh i tini i Hua-tung sahelung a enal, nusatipan belaw u Cung-yan-san-may, nuwalian macapi tu Hay-an a buyu', nutimulan izaw ku lala' nu Wu-he-tay-ti, tepanay nu Siu-ku-luan a sauwac atu adidi'ay a sauwac kasayadah ku masabucuyay cebusay nu nanummasaupu a masacebal, masaenalay a lala', u angangan nu nipalumaan atu pahapay a maluk a kakitizaan. Wu-he namisacayay a buyu' , Kiwit u tusa izaw kutabakiay a buyu', tepanay u sauwac ku kalahini nu liwliw , Kiwit ku-ti mahaymaw ku masapilisay a zazan, yadah ku nipalumaan tu ucya atu heci nipalumaan ku kakikalisiw . lala' nu hekal Ruisui/Kuhkuh a kenis izaw ku se-wen a ba'tu malaklak maliwasak i i Da-ma-yan a buyu', Zun-ku-an a sauwac tusaay a ba'tu atu Hung-ye i papaw nu sauwac, hinaba'tu izaw ku ciaw-san-se-pian a ba'tu, langdaw lian-se-ciaw-san-se a ba'tu, sumilaway malikatay a ba'tu atu kayabes a ba'tu, bunacay a ba'tu malecad a izaw. u culil nu nanum Ruisui/Kuhkuh hamin nu kenis tungusay u Siu-ku-luan a sauwac u kalikitan nu nanum, Siu-ku-luan a sauwac kalikit makayza u nutimulan pasayza i nuwamisan, hamin nu kenis nutimulan a likit tayza i tini a kenis, masa u nu Pusku a kenis. sasangangangiw sa malikit ktukuh i ungay likelikenan miliyas tu keni micumut tu labu nu kenis, makay Kiwit a niyazu'an malikit i Duan-se a likelikenan haw sa, mala u saadidi'ay nu Fakung a lilis nu ladayan, likit tayza i Sing-zou a likelikenan paniyul pasanuwalian malikit micumut tu Fakung a kenis, pakala tu sepat a kung-li mamicumut tu bayu. Hong-ye a sauwac u Siu-ku-luan a tabakiay a sauwac, u angangan i tiza i Wan-zung a kenis Hu-tuw a buyu', malikit i Hun-ye muculil i tini a kenis, i tini i Wu-he-tay-ti atu uyzaay a kenis nu zunaay amapela', i tini tu Siw-san a sangaw nuwalian nutimulan i cacay kung-li micumut tu Siu-ku-luan a sauwac. Hu-yuan a sauwac kasumamadan a kamu u Ma-lan-kou a sauwac, u zuma sa u Ma-ce-low a sauwac, u Siu-ku-luan a sauwac nuzumaay tabakiay a adidi'ay a sauwac. uyniay u sauwac u angangan namakay i Wan-zung a kenis Lung-tay-uen a buyu' i tiza nutimulan, i tini i Hu-yuan nu buyu'ay aidangan namakay tapiingan maala tayni i tiniay a kenis, makayamis tatimul matusul ku hekal nu kenis, i tini i Ruy-mey a niyazu' nuwalian nutimulan cacay a kung-li micumut tu Siu-ku-luan a sauwac. demidad Ruisui/Kuhkuh a demiad tungusay u demiad akuti'ay a bali. kilul tuni nisulitan macapi ku Cung-yan-ci-sian-ci Sen-kung-ci-sian-ci tunisulitan tu nikingsaan, u nipaayaw Ruisui/Kuhkuh nisulitan tu nu demiad i tini i mahiniay i sasa, u kasa'timan amiazih, anumahiza palalecad tu akuti' mahiza u nu Singku a kenis,nika zayhan uyni kakitizaan i Kalinku a helung, cacay ka lecad ku caledes nu demiad mahapinang kacadedes ku Kalingku a dadipasan atu Singku a kenis. laylay Ruisui/Kuhkuh a kenis kasumamadan i tini tuku tademaw mauzip, uyza tu kasumamadan nisubelidan u Sawba a ba'tu, kilul tu nisulitan tuni micekiway tu kasumamadan tu nisubelidan a tuud, uyni nisubelidan a tuud tungusay nu ba'tuay aziday laled katukuh ayza pakalatu tulu a malebut katanaya nu mihcaan, u angangan a lalangawan mahiza nu Puyuma a lalangawan atu Cilin a lalangawan. i kasumamadan tu 19 a mihcaan i sazikuzay ayaw nu padadas nu Layak, tini u kanalelan nu Yun-cu-min, u angangan sa u Amis, kilul tu nisulitan kuni nakamuan tu laylay, u saayaway u Kiwit a niyazuan, Mo-lu-zang, Lan-a-san, A-du-lan, U-ya-li, Cin-san, U-law, Ciya-nana yunian kasaniyazu'. kalisiw u nipahapayay tu aadupan u nikalukan kunilaculan nu Ruisui/Kuhkuh knis, u misakakawaw a tademaw hami nu kenis u malukay tulu izaw ku cacay, u sakalukan izaw nu umahay ku tukus u buyu'ay, hamin nu kanatal izaway ku sapananum nu umahay a tukus, izaw kuni patizeng tu kayku, kuhkuh, ciyak, pahabay tu katalalan u singmuen nu pahapayay a kakitizaan, u nikalukan nipalumaan uyza u tebus u mami u palingat ucya atu kuwa a nipaluma'an. u piidangan pihipangan Hungye a unsing tini i Ruisui/Kuhkuh satipan nu sazikuzay unsing a zazan, tungusay nu Wanzung a kenis, u akuti' 50 tu, u nanum u tingalaway a nanum Tan-suan-cin a unsing, caay ka ngantul, maapi ku unsing nu Ruisui/Kuhkuh a unsing, u Wanzungay hamin a kenis, u akuti' 45 tu, tungusay u Zan-sing-tan a unsing, kalawlawan ku nanum, u kanamuhan nu binawlan u tamelacay a kakitizaan nu unsing.

r~…ĺikit tajza i siŇč-zou a r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan panijur~…ĺ pasanuwar~…ĺian mar~…ĺikit mi ¶umut tu fakuŇč a k…ônis, pakar~…ĺa tu s…ôpat a kuŇč-r~…ĺi mami ¶umut tu baju. ńßoŇč-j…ô a sauwa ¶ u zunaaj amap…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °, i tini tu siw-san a saŇčaw nuwar~…ĺian nutimur~…ĺan i ¶a ¶aj kuŇč-r~…ĺi mi ¶umut tu siu-ku-r~…ĺuan a sauwa ¶. ńßu-juan a sauwa ¶ kasumamadan a kamu u ma-r~…ĺan-kou a sauwa ¶, u zuma sa u ma- ¶…ô-r~…ĺow a sauwa ¶, u siu-ku-r~…ĺuan a sauwa ¶ nuzumaaj tabakiaj a adidi Ē~ °aj a sauwa ¶. ujniaj u sauwa ¶ u aŇčaŇčan namakaj i wan-zuŇč a k…ônis r~…ĺuŇč-taj-u…ôn a buju Ē~ ° i tiza nutimur~…ĺan, i tini i ńßu-juan nu buju Ē~ °aj aidaŇčan namakaj tapiiŇčan maar~…ĺa tajni i tiniaj a k…ônis, makajamis tatimur~…ĺ matusur~…ĺ ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu k…ônis, i tini i *uj-m…ô a nijazu Ē~ ° nuwar~…ĺian nutimur~…ĺan ¶a ¶aj a kuŇč-r~…ĺi mi ¶umut tu siu-ku-r~…ĺuan a sauwa ¶. d…ômidad *uisui/kuńßkuńß a d…ômiad tuŇčusaj u d…ômiad akuti Ē~ °aj a bar~…ĺi. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tuni nisur~…ĺitan ma ¶api ku ¶uŇč-jan- ¶i-sian- ¶i s…ôn-kuŇč- ¶i-sian- ¶i tunisur~…ĺitan tu nikiŇčsaan, u nipaajaw *uisui/kuńßkuńß nisur~…ĺitan tu nu d…ômiad i tini i mańßiniaj i sasa, u kasa Ē~ °timan amiazińß, anumańßiza par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu akuti Ē~ ° mańßiza u nu siŇčku a k…ônis,nika zajńßan ujni kakitizaan i kar~…ĺinku a ńß…ôr~…ĺuŇč, ¶a ¶aj ka r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs nu d…ômiad mańßapinaŇč ka ¶ad…ôd…ôs ku kar~…ĺiŇčku a dadipasan atu siŇčku a k…ônis. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj *uisui/kuńßkuńß a k…ônis kasumamadan i tini tuku tad…ômaw mauzip, ujza tu kasumamadan nisub…ôr~…ĺidan u sawba a ba Ē~ °tu, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nisur~…ĺitan tuni mi ¶…ôkiwaj tu kasumamadan tu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a tuud, ujni nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a tuud tuŇčusaj nu ba Ē~ °tuaj azidaj r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôd katukuńß ajza pakar~…ĺatu tur~…ĺu a mar~…ĺ…ôbut katanaja nu mińß ¶aan, u aŇčaŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan mańßiza nu pujuma a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu ¶ir~…ĺin a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. i kasumamadan tu ** a mińß ¶aan i sazikuzaj ajaw nu padadas nu r~…ĺajak, tini u kanar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺan nu jun- ¶u-min, u aŇčaŇčan sa u amis, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nisur~…ĺitan kuni nakamuan tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj, u saajawaj u kiwit a nijazuan, mo-r~…ĺu-zaŇč, r~…ĺan-a-san, a-du-r~…ĺan, u-ja-r~…ĺi, ¶in-san, u-r~…ĺaw, ¶ija-nana junian kasanijazu Ē~ °. kar~…ĺisiw u nipańßapajaj tu aadupan u nikar~…ĺukan kunir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nu *uisui/kuńßkuńß knis, u misakakawaw a tad…ômaw ńßami nu k…ônis u mar~…ĺukaj tur~…ĺu izaw ku ¶a ¶aj, u sakar~…ĺukan izaw nu umańßaj ku tukus u buju Ē~ °aj, ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ izawaj ku sapananum nu umańßaj a tukus, izaw kuni patiz…ôŇč tu kajku, kuńßkuńß, ¶ijak, pańßabaj tu katar~…ĺar~…ĺan u siŇčmu…ôn nu pańßapajaj a kakitizaan, u nikar~…ĺukan nipar~…ĺumaan ujza u t…ôbus u mami u par~…ĺiŇčat u ¶ja atu kuwa a nipar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. u piidaŇčan pińßipaŇčan ńßuŇčj…ô a unsiŇč tini i *uisui/kuńßkuńß satipan nu sazikuzaj unsiŇč a zazan, tuŇčusaj nu wanzuŇč a k…ônis, u akuti Ē~ ° ** tu, u nanum u tiŇčar~…ĺawaj a nanum tan-suan- ¶in a unsiŇč, ¶aaj ka Ňčantur~…ĺ, maapi ku unsiŇč nu *uisui/kuńßkuńß a unsiŇč, u wanzuŇčaj ńßamin a k…ônis, u akuti Ē~ ° ** tu, tuŇčusaj u zan-siŇč-tan a unsiŇč, kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan ku nanum, u kanamuńßan nu binawr~…ĺan u tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a kakitizaan nu unsiŇč.
S.FORM: Ruisui Ruisui a sakuwan ku Hualien. kumud nu kalesakan, 151.59 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 57.39 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 7.4 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 9,520 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 3,717 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 4,438 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 47%(Pangcah, Sakizaya) ku kasabinawlan. u tademaw ilabu nu siyang u paylang ku alumanay. nikasakuwakuwan Ruisui mala 11 a cuwen atu 16 ku niyazu'. kina 16 a niyazu'sa, Langas , Lacihakan , Morocan , Atolan , Koyo , Ukang , Narowan , Kalala , Sapat , Maibul , Olalip , Fanaw , Olaw , Marorok , Cirocan , Kiwit . ÁĎěÁ©óťĄČ(ťėŅÁĺéŤ™ě:KohkohÔľõśííŚ•áŤźäťõÖŤ™ě:KuhkuhÔľõŤáļÁĀ£ŚģĘŚģ∂Ť™ěśĶ∑ťôłŤÖĒ:suiňá suiňá hiongňč) . Ruisui/Kuhkuh Amis a kamu Kohkoh han, Sakizaya a kamu Kuhkuh han, Taywan a Ngayngay a kamu hay-lu a ngiha nu suiňá suiňá hiongňč, tini i Taywan Hualien akuwan tepanay pasatimulan, nuamisan belaw u Bataan, nusatipan belaw u Wan-zung akuwan, Zuo-si akuwan, nuwalian belaw nu Bakung a kenis, nutinulan mitules tu Pusuku, izaw ku amislic micaluway tuniyan a kenis. tunian a binawln izaw ku Layak, Ngayngay atu Taywan a binacadan angangan, i Taywan u Amis ku katuday a tademaw, zuma u Maibil a niyazu' u Sakizayaay u angangan ku binacadan, i tiniay u Amis atu Ngayngay a kamu. :shuiňämuiňč ), Mizuo,śĒĻÁāļťü≥ŤŅĎšĻč"ÁĎěÁ©ó"(Mizuho). . Ruisui/Kuhkuh malumanay a ngangan "Suy-wey", Taywan a Ngayngay a kamu hay-lu a ngiha nu shuiňämuiňč, u imi u Siu-ku-luan xńę a ikul, zikuzan u Lipun a tademawan zayhan a u śįīŚįĺ nu ngiha nu Lipun mazapi ku "Mizuo", pasumat han u Ruisui/Kuhkuh "Mizuho". hamin ku hekal izaw ku 135 pin-bang-kung-li, izaw ku utademaw pakala tu cacay mang cacay lasubu kuliwan a tademaw, malikid ku nanum nu Siw -ku luan a sauwac a balungaay ku katinengan. . Ruisui/Kuhkuh palecad izaw ku zuzang , ungsing, singanganay a uciy uyni u kapahay a saka izaw, mala u Kalinku mapilung tu aidangan a tu singanganay a kakitaizaan. hekal a lala' Ruisui/Kuhkuh i tini i Hua-tung sahelung a enal, nusatipan belaw u Cung-yan-san-may, nuwalian macapi tu Hay-an a buyu', nutimulan izaw ku lala' nu Wu-he-tay-ti, tepanay nu Siu-ku-luan a sauwac atu adidi'ay a sauwac kasayadah ku masabucuyay cebusay nu nanummasaupu a masacebal, masaenalay a lala', u angangan nu nipalumaan atu pahapay a maluk a kakitizaan. Wu-he namisacayay a buyu' , Kiwit u tusa izaw kutabakiay a buyu', tepanay u sauwac ku kalahini nu liwliw , Kiwit ku-ti mahaymaw ku masapilisay a zazan, yadah ku nipalumaan tu ucya atu heci nipalumaan ku kakikalisiw . lala' nu hekal Ruisui/Kuhkuh a kenis izaw ku se-wen a ba'tu malaklak maliwasak i i Da-ma-yan a buyu', Zun-ku-an a sauwac tusaay a ba'tu atu Hung-ye i papaw nu sauwac, hinaba'tu izaw ku ciaw-san-se-pian a ba'tu, langdaw lian-se-ciaw-san-se a ba'tu, sumilaway malikatay a ba'tu atu kayabes a ba'tu, bunacay a ba'tu malecad a izaw. u culil nu nanum Ruisui/Kuhkuh hamin nu kenis tungusay u Siu-ku-luan a sauwac u kalikitan nu nanum, Siu-ku-luan a sauwac kalikit makayza u nutimulan pasayza i nuwamisan, hamin nu kenis nutimulan a likit tayza i tini a kenis, masa u nu Pusku a kenis. sasangangangiw sa malikit ktukuh i ungay likelikenan miliyas tu keni micumut tu labu nu kenis, makay Kiwit a niyazu'an malikit i Duan-se a likelikenan haw sa, mala u saadidi'ay nu Fakung a lilis nu ladayan, likit tayza i Sing-zou a likelikenan paniyul pasanuwalian malikit micumut tu Fakung a kenis, pakala tu sepat a kung-li mamicumut tu bayu. Hong-ye a sauwac u Siu-ku-luan a tabakiay a sauwac, u angangan i tiza i Wan-zung a kenis Hu-tuw a buyu', malikit i Hun-ye muculil i tini a kenis, i tini i Wu-he-tay-ti atu uyzaay a kenis nu zunaay amapela', i tini tu Siw-san a sangaw nuwalian nutimulan i cacay kung-li micumut tu Siu-ku-luan a sauwac. Hu-yuan a sauwac kasumamadan a kamu u Ma-lan-kou a sauwac, u zuma sa u Ma-ce-low a sauwac, u Siu-ku-luan a sauwac nuzumaay tabakiay a adidi'ay a sauwac. uyniay u sauwac u angangan namakay i Wan-zung a kenis Lung-tay-uen a buyu' i tiza nutimulan, i tini i Hu-yuan nu buyu'ay aidangan namakay tapiingan maala tayni i tiniay a kenis, makayamis tatimul matusul ku hekal nu kenis, i tini i Ruy-mey a niyazu' nuwalian nutimulan cacay a kung-li micumut tu Siu-ku-luan a sauwac. demidad Ruisui/Kuhkuh a demiad tungusay u demiad akuti'ay a bali. kilul tuni nisulitan macapi ku Cung-yan-ci-sian-ci Sen-kung-ci-sian-ci tunisulitan tu nikingsaan, u nipaayaw Ruisui/Kuhkuh nisulitan tu nu demiad i tini i mahiniay i sasa, u kasa'timan amiazih, anumahiza palalecad tu akuti' mahiza u nu Singku a kenis,nika zayhan uyni kakitizaan i Kalinku a helung, cacay ka lecad ku caledes nu demiad mahapinang kacadedes ku Kalingku a dadipasan atu Singku a kenis. laylay Ruisui/Kuhkuh a kenis kasumamadan i tini tuku tademaw mauzip, uyza tu kasumamadan nisubelidan u Sawba a ba'tu, kilul tu nisulitan tuni micekiway tu kasumamadan tu nisubelidan a tuud, uyni nisubelidan a tuud tungusay nu ba'tuay aziday laled katukuh ayza pakalatu tulu a malebut katanaya nu mihcaan, u angangan a lalangawan mahiza nu Puyuma a lalangawan atu Cilin a lalangawan. i kasumamadan tu 19 a mihcaan i sazikuzay ayaw nu padadas nu Layak, tini u kanalelan nu Yun-cu-min, u angangan sa u Amis, kilul tu nisulitan kuni nakamuan tu laylay, u saayaway u Kiwit a niyazuan, Mo-lu-zang, Lan-a-san, A-du-lan, U-ya-li, Cin-san, U-law, Ciya-nana yunian kasaniyazu'. kalisiw u nipahapayay tu aadupan u nikalukan kunilaculan nu Ruisui/Kuhkuh knis, u misakakawaw a tademaw hami nu kenis u malukay tulu izaw ku cacay, u sakalukan izaw nu umahay ku tukus u buyu'ay, hamin nu kanatal izaway ku sapananum nu umahay a tukus, izaw kuni patizeng tu kayku, kuhkuh, ciyak, pahabay tu katalalan u singmuen nu pahapayay a kakitizaan, u nikalukan nipalumaan uyza u tebus u mami u palingat ucya atu kuwa a nipaluma'an. u piidangan pihipangan Hungye a unsing tini i Ruisui/Kuhkuh satipan nu sazikuzay unsing a zazan, tungusay nu Wanzung a kenis, u akuti' 50 tu, u nanum u tingalaway a nanum Tan-suan-cin a unsing, caay ka ngantul, maapi ku unsing nu Ruisui/Kuhkuh a unsing, u Wanzungay hamin a kenis, u akuti' 45 tu, tungusay u Zan-sing-tan a unsing, kalawlawan ku nanum, u kanamuhan nu binawlan u tamelacay a kakitizaan nu unsing.
S.PHON: *uisui *uisui a sakuwan ku ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paŇč ¶ańß, sakizaja) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u tad…ômaw ir~…ĺabu nu sijaŇč u pajr~…ĺaŇč ku ar~…ĺumanaj. nikasakuwakuwan *uisui mar~…ĺa ** a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, r~…ĺaŇčas , r~…ĺa ¶ińßakan , moro ¶an , ator~…ĺan , kojo , ukaŇč , narowan , kar~…ĺar~…ĺa , sapat , maibur~…ĺ , or~…ĺar~…ĺip , fanaw , or~…ĺaw , marorok , ¶iro ¶an , kiwit . ***(***:końßkońß******:kuńßkuńß*********:sui* sui* ńßioŇč*) . *uisui/kuńßkuńß amis a kamu końßkońß ńßan, sakizaja a kamu kuńßkuńß ńßan, tajwan a ŇčajŇčaj a kamu ńßaj-r~…ĺu a Ňčińßa nu sui* sui* ńßioŇč*, tini i tajwan ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn akuwan t…ôpanaj pasatimur~…ĺan, nuamisan b…ôr~…ĺaw u bataan, nusatipan b…ôr~…ĺaw u wan-zuŇč akuwan, zuo-si akuwan, nuwar~…ĺian b…ôr~…ĺaw nu bakuŇč a k…ônis, nutinur~…ĺan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu pusuku, izaw ku amisr~…ĺi ¶ mi ¶ar~…ĺuwaj tunijan a k…ônis. tunian a binawr~…ĺn izaw ku r~…ĺajak, ŇčajŇčaj atu tajwan a bina ¶adan aŇčaŇčan, i tajwan u amis ku katudaj a tad…ômaw, zuma u maibir~…ĺ a nijazu Ē~ ° u sakizajaaj u aŇčaŇčan ku bina ¶adan, i tiniaj u amis atu ŇčajŇčaj a kamu. :sńßui*mui* ), mizuo,*****"**"(mizuńßo). . kur~…ĺiwan a tad…ômaw, mar~…ĺikid ku nanum nu siw -ku r~…ĺuan a sauwa ¶ a bar~…ĺuŇčaaj ku katin…ôŇčan. . *uisui/kuńßkuńß par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad izaw ku zuzaŇč , uŇčsiŇč, siŇčaŇčanaj a u ¶ij ujni u kapańßaj a r~…ĺikit tajza i siŇč-zou a r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan panijur~…ĺ pasanuwar~…ĺian mar~…ĺikit mi ¶umut tu fakuŇč a k…ônis, pakar~…ĺa tu s…ôpat a kuŇč-r~…ĺi mami ¶umut tu baju. ńßoŇč-j…ô a sauwa ¶ u u zuma sa u ma- ¶…ô-r~…ĺow a sauwa ¶, u siu-ku-r~…ĺuan a sauwa ¶ nuzumaaj tabakiaj a adidi Ē~ °aj a sauwa ¶. ujniaj u sauwa ¶ u aŇčaŇčan namakaj i wan-zuŇč a k…ônis r~…ĺuŇč-taj-u…ôn a buju Ē~ ° i tiza kar~…ĺiŇčku a dadipasan atu siŇčku a k…ônis. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj *uisui/kuńßkuńß a k…ônis kasumamadan i tini tuku tad…ômaw mauzip, ujza tu kasumamadan nisub…ôr~…ĺidan u sawba a ba Ē~ °tu, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nisur~…ĺitan tuni mi ¶…ôkiwaj tu kasumamadan tu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a tuud, ujni nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a tuud tuŇčusaj nu ba Ē~ °tuaj azidaj r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôd katukuńß ajza pakar~…ĺatu tur~…ĺu a mar~…ĺ…ôbut katanaja nu mińß ¶aan, u aŇčaŇčan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan mańßiza nu pujuma a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu ¶ir~…ĺin a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. i kasumamadan tu ** a mińß ¶aan i sazikuzaj ajaw nu padadas nu r~…ĺajak, tini u kanar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺan nu jun- ¶u-min, u aŇčaŇčan sa u amis, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nisur~…ĺitan kuni nakamuan tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj, u saajawaj u kiwit a nijazuan, mo-r~…ĺu-zaŇč, r~…ĺan-a-san, a-du-r~…ĺan, u-ja-r~…ĺi, ¶in-san, u-r~…ĺaw, ¶ija-nana junian kasanijazu Ē~ °. kar~…ĺisiw u nipańßapajaj tu aadupan u nikar~…ĺukan kunir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nu *uisui/kuńßkuńß knis, u misakakawaw a tad…ômaw ńßami nu k…ônis u mar~…ĺukaj tur~…ĺu izaw ku ¶a ¶aj, u sakar~…ĺukan izaw nu umańßaj ku tukus u buju Ē~ °aj, ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ izawaj ku sapananum nu umańßaj a tukus, izaw kuni patiz…ôŇč tu kajku, kuńßkuńß, ¶ijak, pańßabaj tu katar~…ĺar~…ĺan u siŇčmu…ôn nu pańßapajaj a kakitizaan, u nikar~…ĺukan nipar~…ĺumaan ujza u t…ôbus u mami u par~…ĺiŇčat u ¶ja atu kuwa a nipar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. u piidaŇčan pińßipaŇčan ńßuŇčj…ô a unsiŇč tini i *uisui/kuńßkuńß satipan nu sazikuzaj unsiŇč a zazan, tuŇčusaj nu wanzuŇč a k…ônis, u akuti Ē~ ° ** tu, u nanum u tiŇčar~…ĺawaj a nanum tan-suan- ¶in a unsiŇč, ¶aaj ka Ňčantur~…ĺ, maapi ku unsiŇč nu *uisui/kuńßkuńß a unsiŇč, u wanzuŇčaj ńßamin a k…ônis, u akuti Ē~ ° ** tu, tuŇčusaj u zan-siŇč-tan a unsiŇč, kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan ku nanum, u kanamuńßan nu binawr~…ĺan u tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a kakitizaan nu unsiŇč.
